Craft room: directions south, west, east. We went east to Gallery, west to Nursery, south to Playroom. Also east from Craft to Gallery (one way). Also maybe north? not listed.

Gallery: only west (to Craft). So dead end.

Playroom: directions north, south. We entered from Craft (south), so Playroom north leads back to Craft. Playroom south leads to Balcony (we moved south). So Playroom south to Balcony.

Balcony: direction north (back to Playroom). So dead end.

- Gallery: west only, explored.

- Playroom: north, south. Both explored (north back to Craft, south Balcony). No east/west.

- Balcony: north only, explored.

Thus no more new directions. So we have visited all rooms reachable. Thus can finish.

Need to output DONE with final graph structure. Need to include all nodes and edges properly. Let's list nodes: Nursery, Billiard room, Craft room, Gallery, Playroom, Balcony.

- Craft south -> Playroom: south: ("Craft room","Playroom"), north: ("Playroom","Craft room").

east: [("Nursery","Craft room"), ("Billiard room","Nursery")]? Wait east from Nursery to Craft, east from Billiard to Nursery. So east list: ("Nursery","Craft room"), ("Billiard room","Nursery").
